note: Static carrier facts — HQ, ticker, editorial notes. Financials and safety come from separate live feeds (carrier_kpis.json from SEC, fmcsa.json from SAFER).

carriers.name: ODFL
carriers.notes: Premium pricing, premium service. Gold standard of LTL margin.

carriers.name: Saia
carriers.notes: Aggressive growth carrier. Absorbed 28 Yellow terminals in 2023.

carriers.name: XPO
carriers.notes: Largest LTL-only player by revenue. Turnaround margin story.

carriers.name: Estes
carriers.notes: Private — SEC financials unavailable; safety data is real.

carriers.name: ArcBest
carriers.notes: Unionized cost base drives structurally higher OR vs non-union peers.

carriers.name: TFI
carriers.notes: Acquired from UPS 2021. Margin turnaround in progress.

carriers.name: R+L
carriers.notes: Private, family-owned. SAFER legal entity is Greenwood Motor Lines.

carriers.name: Southeastern
carriers.notes: Regional specialist with consistently high Mastio service rankings.

carriers.name: Schneider
carriers.notes: Not a hub-and-spoke LTL carrier. LTL exposure via brokerage and volume/partial TL.
